It is a type of succulent that belongs to the genus Tithymalus, which is often considered a synonym for the genus Euphorbia. The Euphorbiaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, commonly known as spurge or euphorbia. This family includes over 2800 species of plants, many of which are succulents or shrubs. The classification of Tithymalus chaborasius is subject to ongoing research and may be revised as new information becomes available.
